{{Quote|Master Ken, you know very well that I don't think.|Chip|<ref name="The Lost City of the Jedi" />}}
'''Chip''', also known as '''Microchip''', was a droid the size and shape of a twelve-year-old boy. Microchip belonged to the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|Jedi Prince]] [[Ken]]. He was Ken's caretaker, since Ken was the only [[Human/Legends|Human]] in the [[Lost City of the Jedi]].

{{Droid-stub}}
